Document.description: Core document entity supporting versioning, approvals, locking, and folder organization

Folder.description: Hierarchical folder structure using materialized path pattern

computed.formula: See domain_rules for document_count computation logic
See domain_rules for folder_count computation logic

DocumentVersion.description: Immutable uploaded file versions for each document

PermissionGrant.description: Fine-grained access control grants on documents or folders

Comment.description: Inline and threaded comments with optional page/position annotations

ApprovalRequest.description: Tracks document approval workflows with multi-approver support

Attachment.description: Additional file attachments associated with a document (separate from versions)

computed_fields.formula: COUNT(DISTINCT permission_grants.grantee_id WHERE document_id=id AND grantee_type='user')

domain_rules.rule: Locked document cannot be edited by non-owner
domain_rules.api_guard: Return 403 if is_locked=true AND user != locked_by AND role != admin
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Disable edit controls and show lock indicator with locker name

domain_rules.rule: Document requires approval before final status if approval workflow configured
domain_rules.api_guard: Return 422 if attempting to set status=approved without completed ApprovalRequest
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show approval request panel if approval workflow is required; disable manual approve

domain_rules.rule: Version number is monotonically increasing and cannot be skipped
domain_rules.api_guard: Set version_number = MAX(existing version_number for document) + 1

domain_rules.rule: Folder path must be unique within org
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Show error if duplicate path detected

domain_rules.rule: Permission grant grantee_type=user requires valid user_id in org
domain_rules.api_guard: Return 422 if grantee_type=user and grantee_id not found in org members
domain_rules.ui_behavior: UserSelector filters to org members only

domain_rules.api_guard: Return 403 on any mutating request if document.status=archived
domain_rules.ui_behavior: Disable all editing controls and show archived banner

endpoints.description: List documents with filtering and pagination
Get single document with current version
Upload a new document (multipart/form-data); creates DocumentVersion v1
Move document to a different folder
Get folder contents — child folders and documents
Get all versions for a document
Upload a new version for a document
Restore a previous version as the current version
Set a specific version as the current version
Get permission grants for a document
Add a comment or annotation to a document
List approval requests visible to current user
Request approval for a document version
Approve or reject an approval request

flows.name: Upload Document
steps: Create DocumentVersion v1 with version_number=1, is_current=true
Generate thumbnail if mime_type is PDF or image

flows.name: Create Version
steps: Set new version is_current=true; set previous current is_current=false

flows.name: Request Approval
steps: POST /documents/:id/approval-requests with approver_ids and optional due_date
Each approver notified via WebSocket and email
If all respond approved: Document.approval_status = approved, status = approved
If any responds rejected: Document.approval_status = rejected, status = rejected

flows.name: Share Document
steps: Grantee can access document per permission_level

flows.name: Lock and Unlock
steps: Other users receive is_locked=true in document data; edit controls disabled

modules.name: DocumentList
modules.description: Document listing with grid/list view toggle

modules.name: FolderBrowser
modules.description: Recursive folder navigation with tree sidebar

modules.name: DocumentDetail
modules.description: Document detail with tabs: Preview / Versions / Comments / Approvals / Activity

modules.name: SharedDocuments
modules.description: Documents shared with the current user

generation_rules.document_preview: Use iframe for general files; PDF.js for PDF rendering with page navigation
generation_rules.folder_tree: Recursive FolderTree React component with expand/collapse; lazy-load children on expand
generation_rules.file_upload: Multipart form-data upload with progress indicator; S3 presigned URL flow supported
generation_rules.version_number: Always computed server-side as MAX(version_number) + 1; never trusted from client
generation_rules.materialized_path: Folder.path updated recursively when folder is moved via SQL UPDATE with prefix replacement

deleted_at.notes: Soft delete — all queries filter deleted_at IS NULL

org_id_injection.middleware: req.body.org_id is stripped; injected from req.user.org_id

conflict_response.message: Record was modified by another user. Refresh and retry.

concurrency.high_contention_tables: see entities with high write concurrency

audit_trail.triggers: application-level (before write hook) — never DB trigger to avoid log bloat

standard_constraints.name: chk_{table}_deleted_order
standard_constraints.expression: deleted_at IS NULL OR deleted_at >= created_at

db_constraints_policy.enum_validation: DB ENUM types preferred over VARCHAR + CHECK; enum values defined in global enums registry

soft_delete_policy.filter: deleted_at IS NULL applied globally via query builder middleware
soft_delete_policy.cascade: Parent delete soft-deletes children via application cascade, not DB cascade
soft_delete_policy.hard_delete: Prohibited in production; available only via admin CLI with audit log
soft_delete_policy.restore: Set deleted_at = NULL; triggers audit log entry

naming_conventions.date_fields: Always use _at suffix for TIMESTAMPTZ, _date suffix for DATE
naming_conventions.id_fields: Primary key is always id; foreign keys are {entity}_id
